name: HyOrc Corp
summary: Overview HyOrc Corporation (HyOrc, we, our, or the Company) is a Wyoming corporation engaged in the research, development, and commercialization of clean-energy technologies designed to decarbonize heavy-duty transport, industrial power generation, and distributed energy applications. Our mission is to develop commercially viable alternatives to diesel engines and fossil fuels, with a focus on hydrogen, methanol, and waste-to-energy solutions.
